element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic movement and positioning
Specializes in forward-facing attacks; default form
Upgrade main weapon up to 3 levels; dropped by defeated enemies
Lateral attack coverage; introduced as strategic alternative
Alters shooting style; reward for container destruction
Area denial weapon; up to 9 units carried; varies by ship form
Accumulate to enable co-op ship merge; limited-time combined form
Adjust ship speed up to 5 levels; tactical pacing tool

typical_tension_triggers: Flickering when too many objects on-screen (engine limit)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based enemy encounters with escalating difficulty; boss gates tension into stage-conclusion moments; power-up system creates resource management tension throughout

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to base ship and Front Offense Type; safe learning phase with initial enemy patterns and power-up discovery
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Integration of Side and Rear Offense Types; escalation of enemy density; introduction of bombs and combination parts mechanics; first major boss spike
difficulty_curve.late_game: Seven Atlantis monsters peak difficulty; complex attack patterns; accumulated power-up management; potential anti-piracy loop-back to Level 1 on unauthorized copies after Level 2
notable_spikes: Flickering overload (engine limitation causing visual/control difficulty)
Anti-piracy enforcement (Level 2 completion loops back to Level 1 on pirated copies)

notable_level_patterns.description: Vertically-scrolling progression with mid-stage enemy waves building toward boss encounter; parallax scrolling creates depth and directionality
Ship form availability (Front/Side/Rear Offense Types) gates strategic options; players must master form-switching mid-combat for optimal coverage
Blue (normal) and red (special) orbs create risk-reward tension; damage reduces power levels; encourages non-collision play and projectile management
Two-player co-op with shared progression; combination parts unlock merged ship form with distinct role division (primary/secondary weapon); designed for resource distribution strategy
